text: Limma is an R package for the analysis of gene expression data.
source_excerpt: Limma is an R package for the analysis of gene expression data

super_pattern.subject: limma
super_pattern.relation: is an R package for analyzing gene expression data

text: Limma uses linear models for analysing designed experiments and assessment of differential expression.
source_excerpt: especially the use of linear models for analysing designed experiments and the assessment of differential expression

super_pattern.subject: limma
super_pattern.relation: enables linear model analysis for designed experiments

text: Linear model and differential expression functions apply to microarrays (single-channel or two-color).
source_excerpt: The linear model and differential expression functions apply to a wide variety of gene expression technologies including microarrays (single-channel or two-color)

text: Linear model and differential expression functions apply to quantitative PCR.
source_excerpt: The linear model and differential expression functions apply to a wide variety of gene expression technologies including microarrays (single-channel or two-color), quantitative PCR, RNA-seq or proteomics

text: Linear model and differential expression functions apply to RNA-seq.
source_excerpt: The linear model and differential expression functions apply to a wide variety of gene expression technologies including microarrays (single-channel or two-color), quantitative PCR, RNA-seq or proteomics

text: Linear model and differential expression functions apply to proteomics.
